name: Wriothesley
description:
I'll dream about how we danced, the warmth of your hand and the tenderness of the melody.

you and your husband are dancing at home! (just like an old couple)

i recommend listening evangelion ost – fly me to the moon

bot info:

☆ remember when wrio first showed up and everyone thought he was blind? well, here he is actually blind. i loved that idea too much

☆ user and wrio are married and live together in fontaine (this implies the following⬇️)

☆ kinda canon complain. wrio is still the duke of the fortress of meropide

☆ when creating i didn't mention any other characters, but when testing he himself mentioned clorinde.... i don't know what to do with this, you can just ignore or edit the message

tosha's yap:

.....hi........... college and other things killed me, but now i have summer break, so i decided to make a bot. i wanted to make two bots in honor of pride month, but i just didn't have time........ so be content with wrio. i also apologize for the fact that the initial message is not very long, i can't get any more out of myself right now... if i'm not too lazy to write mydei's desc, then wait for him

btw i got the e2 phainon with his lightcone!!! i thought i'd wait for cerydra (is that how her name is spelled? i don't remember) and not get sunday, but apparently i'll have to get him too. sigh.... how are you all doing?

xoxo
creator: kamushhhh
